title: Parties snapshot (per election event)
description: Catalog of political parties as they appeared in a single ECI election event. Parties evolve (mergers, splits, alliances), so this snapshot is event-scoped, not global.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Per-event party catalog with ECI numeric code, short/full name, symbol, recognition, alliance.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field (top-level) and optional source override on items per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Empty array means hand-authored. Item-level source overrides removed.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

election.description: ECI event id (e.g. AcGenMay2026) this snapshot is scoped to.

eci_code.description: ECI numeric party code (stored as string to preserve any leading zeros). Independents are not parties; they have no eci_code and are not listed here.

recognition.description: ECI recognition status as of this event.

alliance.description: Pre-poll alliance name as of this event, if any (e.g. SPA, NDA). Null for non-aligned parties.
